title: Booking a Hotel by Phone

segments.text: Hello, I would like to book a room for two nights.
When would you like to arrive?
We have a double room available.
Could I have your name and credit card number, please?

transcript: Hello, I would like to book a room for two nights. Of course. When would you like to arrive? Friday the eighth. We have a double room available. How much per night? It's ninety dollars including breakfast. That sounds good. I'll take it. Could I have your name and credit card number, please? Sure.
